metadata.name: Cloudflare DNS Record
metadata.description: Creates a single Cloudflare DNS record for A, AAAA, CNAME, TXT, or MX with type-specific inputs, TTL, and proxying where supported.
metadata.guide: ## Overview¥nCreates a single Cloudflare DNS record for A, AAAA, CNAME, TXT, or MX.¥n¥n## How to Use¥nThis template renders `main.tf` as a file.¥n¥n1. Provide the Cloudflare zone ID and the DNS name you want to manage.¥n2. Choose the `record_type` first, then fill in only the fields that apply to that record type.¥n3. Render the Terraform file and run `terraform fmt`, `terraform plan`, and `terraform apply` in the target workspace.¥n¥n## Variable Guide¥n### General¥n- `resource_name`: Terraform resource name (alphanumeric and underscores only); optional; default: `dns_record`.¥n- `cloudflare_zone_id`: Cloudflare Zone ID; required.¥n- `name`: DNS record name (`@` for the zone apex); optional; default: `app`.¥n- `record_type`: Record type to create; optional; default: `A`; options: `A`, `AAAA`, `CNAME`, `TXT`, `MX`.¥n- `ttl`: Record TTL in seconds (`1` = automatic); optional; default: `1`.¥n¥n### A Record¥n- `ipv4_address`: IPv4 address for `A` records; required when `record_type=A`.¥n- `proxied`: Enable Cloudflare proxying; optional; default: `true`; shown only for `A`, `AAAA`, and `CNAME`.¥n¥n### AAAA Record¥n- `ipv6_address`: IPv6 address for `AAAA` records; required when `record_type=AAAA`.¥n- `proxied`: Enable Cloudflare proxying; optional; default: `true`; shown only for `A`, `AAAA`, and `CNAME`.¥n¥n### CNAME Record¥n- `target_hostname`: Canonical hostname target for `CNAME` records; required when `record_type=CNAME`.¥n- `proxied`: Enable Cloudflare proxying; optional; default: `true`; shown only for `A`, `AAAA`, and `CNAME`.¥n¥n### TXT Record¥n- `text_value`: TXT value; required when `record_type=TXT`.¥n¥n### MX Record¥n- `mail_server`: Mail server hostname for `MX` records; required when `record_type=MX`.¥n- `priority`: MX priority (lower value = higher priority); required when `record_type=MX`; default: `10`.¥n¥n## Notes¥n- Proxying only applies to record types Cloudflare supports for orange-cloud mode.¥n- MX records require a mail server target plus priority.¥n¥n## References¥n- [Cloudflare DNS](https://www.cloudflare.com/dns/)¥n- [Terraform Provider](https://registry.terraform.io/providers/cloudflare/cloudflare/latest/docs/resources/dns_record)

items.name: resource_name
items.title: Resource Name
items.description: Terraform resource name (alphanumeric and underscores only)

items.name: name
items.title: Record Name
items.description: DNS record name (use @ for the root domain).

items.name: ttl
items.title: TTL
items.description: Time to live (1 = automatic, or 60-86400 seconds)

items.name: ipv4_address
items.title: IPv4 Address
items.description: IPv4 address for an A record.

items.name: ipv6_address
items.title: IPv6 Address
items.description: IPv6 address for an AAAA record.

items.name: target_hostname
items.title: Target Hostname
items.description: Canonical hostname target for a CNAME record.

items.name: text_value
items.title: TXT Value
items.description: Text value for a TXT record.

items.name: mail_server
items.title: Mail Server
items.description: Mail server hostname for an MX record.

items.name: priority
items.title: Priority
items.description: MX record priority (lower value = higher priority).
